title: oenanthe lachenalii subsp. silaifolia
intro: Oenanthe lachenalii subsp. silaifolia, also known as Water Avens or Water Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to wetlands in Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenanthe lachenalii subsp. silaifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. Oenanthe lachenalii subsp. silaifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
